state_dir.description: Directory used as the base for agent state.

name.description: Common Name for this host's identity certificate.

cert.description: Path where the agent writes and reads its identity certificate (PEM).

key.description: Path where the agent writes and reads its identity private key (PEM).

issuer_ca_bundle.description: Path to the CA bundle used to verify the identity certificate issuer (PEM).

bootstrap_token.description: Path to the bootstrap token file. Required only during initial enrollment.

renew_before.description: Renew the identity certificate when less than this time remains before expiry.

warn_before.description: Log a warning when less than this time remains before expiry. Should be greater than renew_before.

step_ca.description: step-ca provider configuration. Required when provider is step-ca.

fingerprint.description: SHA256 fingerprint of the step-ca root CA. Required if root_ca_bundle is not set.

root_ca_bundle.description: Path to the step-ca root CA bundle (PEM). Required if fingerprint is not set.

server_ca_bundle.description: Path to the CA bundle used to verify the broker's TLS certificate (PEM).

certificates.description: List of service certificates this agent manages.

name.description: Unique name for this certificate entry.

profile.description: Name of the broker profile to request. Must be listed under this host in the policy.

key.description: Path where the agent writes the service private key (PEM).

cert.description: Path where the agent writes the service certificate (PEM).

chain.description: Path where the agent writes the intermediate chain (PEM).

fullchain.description: Path where the agent writes the full chain (leaf + intermediates, PEM).

reload_command.description: Shell command executed after the certificate is installed or renewed.

reload_timeout.description: Maximum time allowed for the reload command to complete.

renew_before.description: Request a new certificate when less than this time remains before expiry.
